response:
Emily gathered twenty-four sweet berries from the bush while David picked fifteen more than her total count to reach thirty-nine fruits in his basket.

***

Sophia harvested only thirteen blueberries because David collected three times that specific amount during their morning outing together.

***

The trio combined all their fruit to create seven full batches of muffins since each recipe needs nine berries and they sold every batch for five dollars.

***

Their hard work earned thirty-five dollars in profit for the young community members who helped gather the harvest this sunny youth.
